references.title: The 10 best AI meeting assistants in 2026
Meeting note tool pricing: Granola vs. Fireflies vs. Fathom vs. Otter
9 Best AI Meeting Assistants 2026 (Bot-Free Options Tested)
Best AI Meeting Assistants 2026 | Data-Backed Reviews
The 10 Best AI Note Takers in 2026 (Tested and Ranked)

en.commentary: I've run every assistant on this list through real product, sales, and design meetings over the past two months, and the verdict is decisive: Granola takes #1. The bot-free desktop architecture genuinely changes the meeting dynamic. When the other side sees no 'AI is recording' notice, conversations stay candid and the awkward consent moment disappears entirely. Pair that with AI that augments your manual notes instead of dumping a 4,000-word transcript on you, and the time-to-useful-summary collapses to seconds. The $14/month Business tier is priced where it should be, and the $5 billion valuation tells you the market agrees. Fathom at #2 is the clearest value play in the entire category. Unlimited recording, transcription, and storage on the free tier across all three major platforms is genuinely the most generous free plan I've ever tested, even with the 5 AI summary cap. For individuals and bootstrap teams, this is the obvious first pick. Otter.ai at #3 holds its position on transcription accuracy and the conversational search feature that lets you query past meetings like a database. The $8.33/month Pro pricing remains competitive even as the field has filled in around it. Fireflies at #4 wins the integrations battle decisively: 50+ connectors with Salesforce, HubSpot, Notion, and Slack make it the de facto standard for sales operations workflows. The hidden AI credit consumption on AskFred and CRM Autofill is the catch heavy users need to budget for. Fellow at #5 deserves a hard look from anyone in regulated industries: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA, zero training on customer data, plus the only structured agenda-to-action-item lifecycle in the category at $7/user/month.

highlights.title: Granola Takes #1 Because Bot-Free Capture Is the Most Important Product Decision This Category Has Made
highlights.body: Every other tool on this list except Krisp and Fellow's bot-free mode sends a visible bot into your meeting. That visible bot changes the conversation. People speak more carefully when 'AI is recording' shows up in the participant list. Granola captures system audio directly from your desktop, so the conversation runs as if no recording exists, and you still get the full transcript and AI summary afterward. The product manager, VC, and consultant communities have rallied around this for a reason. The $5 billion Q1 2026 valuation reflects how much pricing power 'no awkward bot' actually has.

highlights.title: Fathom at #2 Is the Best Free AI Meeting Assistant Money Can't Buy
highlights.body: Unlimited recording, unlimited transcription, unlimited storage across Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams, all on the free tier. The 5 AI summary monthly cap is a real limit, but for individual users who mostly want a searchable archive with occasional AI digests, this is the clear winner. The $19/month Premium tier unlocks unlimited AI summaries and Zapier integrations, and it's still cheaper than Otter, Fireflies, or Read's equivalent tiers. If you're starting from zero and don't know which tool to commit to, install Fathom this afternoon.

highlights.title: Fireflies at #4 Owns the Sales Operations Workflow Despite the AI Credit Surprise
highlights.body: 50+ integrations including Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Notion, and Zapier is the deepest integration layer in this category. Pro pricing at $10/user/month annual undercuts Otter Business by half and the Business tier unlocks team workspaces, CRM auto-sync, and API access. The catch heavy users hit fast: AskFred conversational search, Magic Soundbites, and CRM Autofill all consume AI credits, and credit top-ups can run 2 to 3 times the base subscription. Budget accordingly, especially if your team runs 30+ meetings per week.

highlights.title: Fellow at #5 Is the Right Pick for Regulated Industries and Anyone Who Cares About the Full Meeting Lifecycle
highlights.body: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, and HIPAA compliance with zero training on customer data and configurable retention down to zero-day deletion makes Fellow the most defensible choice for finance, legal, healthcare, and government teams. The Team plan at $7/user/month is roughly half the price of Granola's Business tier, and it covers the entire arc from structured agenda to action item assignment to follow-through tracking. Bot and bot-free recording modes give teams flexibility on visible AI consent. If your security team has ever blocked an AI tool rollout, Fellow is the conversation starter.

highlights.title: Gong at #13 Earns the Last Spot Because Revenue Intelligence Is a Different Product Category, Not Just a Note Taker
highlights.body: $1,600 per user per year plus a $5,000 platform fee is enterprise revenue intelligence pricing, and the value calculation only works for sales organizations with 50+ reps where Deal Boards, forecasting, and coaching analytics drive measurable ARR lift. For everyone smaller, Avoma at $19/month delivers 80% of the conversation intelligence at 4% of the cost. Gong belongs on this list because some readers genuinely need it, but the per-seat math eliminates it from any list that includes individual users and small teams.

zh-tw.commentary:
說真的，過去兩個月我把這份清單上每一款都拿去跑真實的產品會議、業務通話、設計討論，結論很明確：Granola 拿第一。無 Bot 桌面架構徹底改寫了會議的氣氛。對方看不到「AI 正在錄製」的提示，對話就回到正常狀態，那種尷尬的同意流程整個消失。AI 在你手動筆記的基礎上補脈絡，不是丟給你四千字逐字稿，從會議結束到拿到可用摘要只要幾秒鐘。月費約台幣四百多的 Business 方案定價合理，估值在 2026 年 Q1 衝到 50 億美元，市場已經給了答案。

Fathom 第二，這個品類最強的 CP 值選擇。免費版錄影、轉錄、儲存全部無限，三大平台都覆蓋，這是我用過所有 AI 工具裡免費福利最猛的。Otter.ai 第三穩住，轉錄準確度與會議資料庫對話搜尋還是業界標竿。Fireflies 第四，50 個以上整合讓它成為業務團隊跑 CRM 自動化的事實標準。Fellow 第五，三證齊全加上完整會議生命週期管理，金融法務醫療業最該認真評估的選擇。

highlights.title: Granola 拿第一，因為「無 Bot 擷取」是這個品類做過最重要的產品決定
highlights.body: 這份清單上除了 Krisp 跟 Fellow 的無 Bot 模式，其他工具全部都會派一個看得見的 Bot 加入會議。那個可見的 Bot 會改變對話的內容。當「AI 正在錄製」出現在參與者列表，大家講話就會變得謹慎。Granola 直接從你電腦擷取系統音訊，會議現場跟沒錄音一模一樣，但你照樣拿到完整逐字稿與 AI 摘要。產品經理、創投、顧問族群一面倒選它有它的道理，2026 年 Q1 估值衝到 50 億美元，反映出「沒有那個尷尬的 Bot」這件事的定價能力有多強。

highlights.title: Fathom 第二，是這個品類用錢買不到的最強免費 AI 會議助理
highlights.body: 免費版錄影無限、轉錄無限、儲存無限，Zoom、Google Meet、Teams 三平台全包。AI 摘要每月 5 次是真的限制，但對於只想要一個可搜尋會議檔案庫加偶爾 AI 摘要的個人用戶來說，這是清楚的贏家。月費約六百多的 Premium 解鎖無限 AI 摘要與 Zapier 整合，比 Otter、Fireflies、Read 的同等方案都便宜。如果你剛開始用這類工具還不確定要選哪個，今天下午就裝 Fathom，先用起來。

highlights.title: Fireflies 第四，掌握業務團隊的 CRM 工作流，但 AI 點數消耗要列預算
highlights.body: 50 個以上整合包含 Salesforce、HubSpot、Slack、Notion、Zapier，這個整合層在這個品類最深。Pro 方案月費年繳台幣三百多比 Otter Business 便宜一半，Business 方案解鎖團隊工作區、CRM 自動同步與 API。重度使用者很快會碰到的坑：AskFred 對話搜尋、Magic Soundbites、CRM Autofill 都會消耗 AI 點數，點數加值跑起來可能是基本訂閱費的 2 到 3 倍。如果你團隊每週開 30 場以上會議，這筆預算要事先抓好。

highlights.title: Fellow 第五，是受監管產業跟在意完整會議生命週期的人應該選的工具
highlights.body: SOC 2 Type II、GDPR、HIPAA 三證齊全，承諾零客戶資料訓練，保留期間可以設定到當日刪除，這讓 Fellow 成為金融、法務、醫療、政府團隊最站得住腳的選擇。Team 方案月費年繳台幣兩百多，大約是 Granola Business 的一半，涵蓋從結構化議程、行動項目指派、到後續追蹤的完整流程。Bot 與無 Bot 兩種錄影模式讓團隊在 AI 同意這件事上有彈性。如果你公司資安團隊曾經擋過 AI 工具上線，Fellow 是最容易切入對話的工具。

highlights.title: Gong 第十三，因為營收智能是另一個產品品類，把它當會議筆記工具是搞錯尺度
highlights.body: 每位用戶年費 1,600 美元加上 5,000 美元平台啟用費，這是企業營收智能等級的定價。價值計算只在 50 人以上的銷售團隊才划算，Deal Boards、預測、教練分析能帶來可量化的 ARR 增長。對所有規模更小的團隊來說，Avoma 月費約台幣六百多就能拿到 80% 的對話智能，成本只有 Gong 的 4%。Gong 列在這份清單是因為真的有讀者需要它，但每位用戶換算下來的金額就讓它從任何包含個人用戶與小團隊的榜單裡自動出局。

references.title: Granola hits product-market fit with creative teams
Fathom free plan still the best deal in meeting AI
Privacy notes after switching from Otter to Granola

en.commentary: First Tuesday standup after the Mother's Day weekend and the inbox was a wall of brunch threads, family group chats, and follow-up notes from rushed pre-holiday meetings. This is exactly the workload that separates a real meeting assistant from a glorified transcriber, and Granola is still the one I trust to pull a clean action list out of a chaotic week. Its template system reformats my notes into something I can actually paste into a Notion page without rewriting half of it. Fathom moves up a hair today because the free plan keeps doing the impossible, full unlimited recording with summaries that read like a competent intern wrote them, and that is the single best deal in this category for solo operators. Otter holds third on transcription quality, the live captions are still ahead of the field for accuracy in noisy rooms, but the AI summary side has gotten stale and I find myself rewriting more of it than I should. Fireflies stays at four on the strength of its CRM and project tool integrations, which is the only reason a sales team should still be paying for it. Fellow earns its spot for privacy-conscious teams, the on-device processing story is real and not marketing. The bottom half is mostly enterprise dressing, Copilot and Gong cost too much for what they deliver to anyone who is not a Fortune 500 buyer. If you are picking one tool this week, Granola for product and design, Fathom for solo work, that is the whole list.

highlights.title: Granola turns post-holiday meeting chaos into clean action items
highlights.body: After three days of half-finished pre-vacation handoffs, Granola was the only tool that produced a one-screen action list I could actually act on. The template engine is what makes the difference, it reformats live notes into the shape my team already uses.

highlights.title: Fathom's free plan is still the best deal in this category
highlights.body: Unlimited recording, unlimited summaries, and AI-generated action items at zero cost makes Fathom an obvious yes for solo operators and small teams. Anyone paying Otter pro tier for the same job should switch this week.

highlights.title: Otter wins on raw transcription, loses on summary quality
highlights.body: Live captions and speaker separation remain the most accurate I have tested, especially in conference rooms with overlapping voices. The AI summary tab keeps producing generic bullet points though, which is why it is third and not first.

highlights.title: Skip the enterprise tier unless you are actually enterprise
highlights.body: Microsoft 365 Copilot at twelve and Gong at thirteen tells the whole story. The integrations are deep but the per-seat economics only work if you are paying with someone else's procurement budget.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節連假後第一個 Tuesday，信箱滿滿都是放假前沒收尾的會議跟一堆家族群組混在一起的待辦。這種爆炸狀態最考驗會議 AI，老實說 Granola 還是唯一一個我敢相信它能整理出乾淨 action list 的工具。它的模板系統會把我潦草的筆記直接排成 Notion 可貼的格式，省下我至少半小時的整理時間。Fathom 今天分數微升，講真的，免費方案無限錄音加上摘要還能讀，這在現在的市場上根本破壞行情，個人工作者或小團隊沒理由不用。Otter 排第三，逐字稿準度還是業界最強，特別是會議室裡有人搶話的時候它的分音準到嚇人，可是 AI 摘要那一塊真的停滯了，我自己重寫的比例越來越高。Fireflies 第四，靠 CRM 跟專案工具的整合度撐住排名，業務團隊還在用它就是這個原因。Fellow 隱私分數 9.5 不是隨便給的，在地端處理是真的有在做。後段班基本上就是 enterprise 包裝，Copilot 跟 Gong 對一般使用者來說 CP 值差太多。這禮拜要選一個就好的話，產品設計團隊 Granola，個人工作者 Fathom，其實就這樣。

highlights.title: 連假後的會議地獄就是 Granola 表演舞台
highlights.body: 放假前三天那種收不完的交接會，Granola 直接給我一頁能用的 action list。它的模板引擎才是關鍵，把我邊聽邊打的潦草筆記重排成我團隊已經習慣的格式。

highlights.title: Fathom 免費方案是這個分類最佛心的存在
highlights.body: 無限錄音、無限摘要、AI 自動產出 action items 全部 NT$0，個人工作者跟小團隊根本沒理由不用。還在付 Otter pro 月費做一樣的事的人，這禮拜就可以換了。

highlights.title: Otter 逐字稿是強項，摘要是弱項
highlights.body: 即時字幕跟分音準度我測過的工具裡還是最高，特別是上班族開會室裡那種一堆人搶話的場景。可是 AI 摘要那一頁產出的還是制式 bullet point，所以它是第三不是第一。

highlights.title: 不是大企業就不要碰企業版
highlights.body: Microsoft 365 Copilot 第十二、Gong 第十三就是答案。整合度確實深，但 per seat 那個價格只有用別人預算才會合理，自己掏錢看了會痛。

references.title: Granola launches team plans with shared meeting library
Fathom rolls out 2-minute video summaries
Otter.ai integration with Slack Huddles ships

en.commentary: Granola stays on top because the team plan launch this week finally gives small companies a shared meeting library without forcing the messy IT-driven rollouts that Fireflies and Otter require. The pricing is right and the onboarding is the least friction-laden I have tested. Fathom holds second and the 2-minute video summary feature shipped this week is the single most useful addition to a meeting assistant since speaker diarization went mainstream. Sales teams that need to share specific clips with prospects will move to Fathom for this alone. Otter shipped Slack Huddles integration that works correctly, which is unexpectedly the cleanest implementation of huddle transcription I have seen, and it earns a small score bump. Fireflies is unchanged. Otter slides to fourth because the Slack Huddles integration that earned it the score bump last week is now a stable feature rather than news, and innovation cadence at Otter has visibly slowed against the field. Fathom holds second with the bot-less mode plus 2-minute video summaries combo that is still the right pick for sales clip sharing. Fellow stays at fifth for regulated industries. Everything below Fellow is unchanged. The real story this week is that proactive workflow execution is becoming table stakes, and Fireflies is the first non-Granola vendor to ship it convincingly.

zh-tw.commentary: Fathom 守住榜首，六月的評測還給了我更多把它放第一的理由。它現在拿下整個類別最高的 G2 評分，6000 多則評論給出 5.0，免費版也是我看過最大方的，無限錄音、無限儲存、有 AI 摘要、沒有時間限制、連卡都不用刷。對大多數個人跟小團隊來說，這個組合根本沒得打，所以它 CP 值給到 9.8。Granola 穩坐第二，只要你開會最怕畫面上跳出一隻會議機器人，我就推它。一堆人就是為了這點跳槽過來，沒有 bot 進來、沒有尷尬的通知，筆記直接在本機乾乾淨淨記好，它使用體驗 9.8 就是反映它做事多安靜。Otter 第三，靠的是可搜尋的會議庫，你是用問的去問一場會議，不是滑著逐字稿找。Fireflies 守第四，靠它深度整合的本事，把會議結論直接灌進 CRM 這件事它還是業界最強。Fellow 守住位子，靠的是前段班最硬的隱私規格，還拿了 Wirecutter 推薦。今年的態勢很清楚：逐字稿這件事本身已經被解決了，真正拉開差距的是摘要多快生出來、講者標得多準、還有現場到底歡不歡迎一隻 bot。我維持排名不動，因為每個前段班都有它非存在不可的理由。

highlights.title: Fathom 是 CP 值之王
highlights.body: 類別最高 G2 評分，6000 多則給 5.0，加上我測過最大方的免費版。CP 值穩在 9.8，它就是第一。

highlights.title: Granola 吃定無 bot 開會
highlights.body: 一堆人就為了沒有 bot 進來、沒有尷尬通知跳槽過來，筆記在本機乾淨記好。使用體驗 9.8 反映它做事多安靜。

highlights.title: 逐字稿已解決，看合不合用

en.commentary: Fathom keeps my number one and this week's reviews back it hard. It is the strongest all-rounder in the category, pairing unlimited free recording across Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams with 30-second post-call summaries, roughly 95 percent transcription accuracy, and native HubSpot and Salesforce hooks. It also carries the highest G2 rating in the space, a 5.0 from thousands of reviews, and that consistency is exactly why I keep it at the top for most teams. Granola holds a very close second and remains my pick for anyone who wants a quiet, bot-free experience. It captures device audio without sending a visible bot into the call, then layers AI context onto your own notes, and it now ships across Mac, Windows, and mobile so it fits far more workflows than it used to. Otter and Fireflies stay strong in the middle, with Otter's conversational search and Fireflies' deep CRM integrations and its new Voice Agents and AI Skills features giving each a clear reason to exist. Fellow keeps its edge on privacy and workflow structure, and tl;dv and Read AI round out the practical picks. Further down, Krisp leans on its noise-cancelling roots, Zoom AI Companion rides bundled convenience, and Gong stays the revenue-intelligence heavyweight that justifies its price only for sales-led orgs. Nothing this week moved the order, so I am holding every rank.

highlights.title: Fathom stays the all-rounder
highlights.body: Unlimited free recording, 30-second summaries, roughly 95 percent accuracy, native HubSpot and Salesforce hooks, and the highest G2 rating in the category. That consistency keeps it first for most teams.

highlights.title: Granola owns the bot-free lane
highlights.body: It captures device audio with no visible bot, then layers AI onto your own notes. Now on Mac, Windows, and mobile, it fits far more workflows and stays a very close second.

highlights.title: Fireflies ships new features
highlights.body: Voice Agents for automated two-way calls and AI Skills with model selection and CRM routing keep it strong. For CRM-heavy teams, its integration depth remains the draw in fourth.

highlights.title: Gong for revenue teams only
highlights.body: Its transcription and CRM depth are excellent, but the price only pencils out for sales-led organizations. It stays the specialist heavyweight rather than a general pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我第一名還是 Fathom，評測也挺得很用力。它是這類裡最全能的，Zoom、Google Meet、Teams 通吃無限免費錄製，配上會後 30 秒摘要、大約 95% 的逐字稿準確度，還有 HubSpot 跟 Salesforce 原生串接。它 G2 評分也是這領域最高，幾千則評論給到 5.0，這種穩定度正是我大多數團隊都推它坐第一的原因。Granola 守住緊咬的第二，也是我推給想要安靜、免機器人進會議體驗的人的首選。它抓裝置音訊而不派一隻看得到的機器人進會議，再把 AI 脈絡疊到你自己的筆記上，現在 Mac、Windows、手機都有，能塞進的工作流比以前多很多。Otter 跟 Fireflies 守中段，Otter 的對話式搜尋跟 Fireflies 深度 CRM 串接、加上新的 Voice Agents 跟 AI Skills，各有各存在的理由。Fellow 在隱私跟流程結構上保有優勢，tl;dv 跟 Read AI 收尾實用選擇。往下 Krisp 吃它降噪的老本，Zoom AI Companion 靠內建方便，Gong 還是營收智慧的重量級，價格只有業務導向的組織撐得起。這週沒動到順位，所以我全部維持。

highlights.title: Fathom 續當全能王
highlights.body: 無限免費錄製、30 秒摘要、約 95% 準確度、HubSpot 跟 Salesforce 原生串接，G2 評分還是這類最高。這種穩定度讓它對大多數團隊守第一。

highlights.body: 自動雙向通話的 Voice Agents、加上可選模型跟 CRM 路由的 AI Skills 讓它續強。CRM 吃重的團隊，它的串接深度還是第四名的賣點。

en.commentary: Fathom holds first this week on the strongest free tier in the category: unlimited recording, transcription, and AI summaries with no time cap, and post-call processing that lands in about 30 seconds. It also carries the highest G2 rating I see, a 5.0 from more than 6,000 reviews, which matches my own experience of clean summaries with almost no setup. Granola stays a close second because its bot-free desktop capture is the most natural way I have found to take notes: it listens to your device audio and enhances your own manual notes rather than sending a visible bot into the call. I keep it as my pick for one-on-ones and sensitive meetings. Fireflies earns a small integrations bump to 9.7 this week after adding Talk to Fireflies, a Perplexity-powered layer that pulls web answers inside a meeting, which strengthens an already deep CRM and automation stack. Otter stays third for reliable transcription and conversational search. For teams glued to Microsoft, 365 Copilot integrates everywhere but still costs the most for what you get. Gong remains the enterprise revenue-intelligence heavyweight, priced accordingly. Pick Fathom to start free, Granola for a bot-free workflow, Fireflies when integrations rule your day.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Fathom 守第一，靠的是這類別裡最強的免費方案：不限時的錄音、逐字稿跟 AI 摘要，會後處理大約 30 秒就好。它的 G2 評分也是我看到最高的，超過 6,000 則評論給到 5.0，這跟我自己的體感一致，幾乎不用設定就能拿到乾淨的摘要。Granola 緊追第二，因為它無 bot 的桌面收音是我用過最自然的做筆記方式：它聽你裝置的聲音，強化你自己手打的筆記，而不是派一個看得見的機器人進會議。開一對一或敏感會議時，我都選它。Fireflies 這週整合分數小升到 9.7，因為它加了 Talk to Fireflies，一個由 Perplexity 驅動的層，能在會議裡直接拉網路答案，讓它本來就很深的 CRM 跟自動化生態更強。Otter 守第三，逐字稿穩定又有對話式搜尋。整天離不開 Microsoft 的團隊，365 Copilot 到處都能整合，但相對於給的東西還是最貴。Gong 依然是企業級營收情報的重量級選手，價格也相應地高。想免費起步選 Fathom，想無 bot 工作流選 Granola，整合當家就選 Fireflies。

Add the highest G2 rating in the category and it is simply the tool I recommend to the most people. Granola stays a close second and remains my pick for anyone who dislikes bots joining calls, because its device-audio approach lets you jot rough notes and have the AI clean them up afterward without an awkward third participant in the room. Fireflies stays fourth as the integration workhorse, feeding meeting data into 50-plus tools and CRM workflows better than anyone here.
